main.description: Community profile. Singleton record at rkey 'self' on the community's own PDS. Modeled after community.opensocial.profile.

displayName.description: Human-readable community name as typed by the creator. UI shows this — never the salted handle.

joinMode.description: Who can join. 'open' = any signed-in user. 'invite' = redeem-required (M4 feature; lexicon field exists in M3 but only 'open' is implemented end-to-end).

avatar.description: Community icon. Optional. No banner field in M3 — banner is M4+.
